rules_text.en: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 5 cards.
rules_text.fr: Mélangez votre main avec votre deck. Ensuite, piochez 5 cartes.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Paralysé.

flavor_text.en: The thread it secretes from its rear is as strong as wire. The secret behind the thread's strength is the topic of ongoing research.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, si le Pokémon Défenseur essaie d'attaquer, votre adversaire lance une pièce. Si c'est pile, l'attaque n'est pas lancée.

flavor_text.en: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: Though it looks like Tentacool, Toedscool is a completely different species. Its legs may be thin, but it can run at a speed of 30 mph.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Brûlé.

text.en: If this Pokémon has any {R} Energy attached, this attack does 90 more damage.
text.fr: Si au moins une Énergie {R} est attachée à ce Pokémon, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Brûlé.

flavor_text.en: Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal.

text.en: This Pokémon is now Asleep. Heal 30 damage from it.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon est maintenant Endormi. Soignez 30 dégâts de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It is always vacantly lost in thought, but no one knows what it is thinking about. It is good at fishing with its tail.
Clauncher's claws will regrow if they fall off. The meat inside the claws is edible, but it has a distinct flavor that doesn't appeal to all tastes.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, évitez tous les dégâts et les effets d'attaques infligés à ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.

text.en: This attack does 50 damage for each Tatsugiri in your discard pile.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 50 dégâts pour chaque Nigirigon dans votre pile de défausse.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it's bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.

text.en: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched {L} Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires pour chacun de vos Pokémon {L} de Banc. Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont pas affectés par la Faiblesse.

flavor_text.en: A pair may be seen rubbing their cheek pouches together in an effort to share stored electricity.

text.en: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez toutes les Énergies de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Pawmot's fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.

text.en: Your opponent chooses 1 of their Benched Pokémon and switches it with their Active Pokémon. The new Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
text.fr: Votre adversaire choisit l'un de ses Pokémon de Banc et l'échange contre son Pokémon Actif. Le nouveau Pokémon Actif est maintenant Endormi.

flavor_text.en: When it twitches its nose, it can tell where someone is sleeping and what that person is dreaming about.
The horns on its head provide a strong power that enables it to sense people's emotions.

text.en: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie attachée au Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: It has a psychic power that enables it to distort the space around it and see into the future.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce Pokémon subit 30 dégâts de moins provenant des attaques (après application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon is smooth and moist to the touch. Yeast in Fidough's breath induces fermentation in the Pokémon's vicinity.

text.en: This attack does 10 damage for each {P} Pokémon in your discard pile.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts pour chaque Pokémon {P} dans votre pile de défausse.

flavor_text.en: This friendly Pokémon doesn't like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 20 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: They communicate with one another using their auras. They are able to run all through the night.
It submerges itself in sand and moves as if swimming. This wise behavior keeps its enemies from finding it and maintains its temperature.

text.en: This Pokémon is now Confused.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon est maintenant Confus.

flavor_text.en: Klawf hangs upside-down from cliffs, waiting for prey. But Klawf can't remain in this position for long because its blood rushes to its head.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: Mabosstiff loves playing with children. Though usually gentle, it takes on an intimidating look when protecting its family.

text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 3 cartes Outil Pokémon, montrez-les, puis ajoutez-les à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, le Pokémon Défenseur ne peut pas battre en retraite.

flavor_text.en: Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.
Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.
They flock around mountains and fields, chasing after bug Pokémon. Their singing is noisy and annoying.
No matter how much it stuffs its belly with food, it is always anxious about getting hungry again. So, it stashes berries in its cheeks and tail.

rules_text.en: Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 card in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, put that card onto the Basic Pokémon to evolve it, skipping the Stage 1. You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.
rules_text.fr: Choisissez l'un de vos Pokémon de base en jeu. Si vous avez dans votre main une carte Évolution de Niveau 2 de ce Pokémon-là, placez celle-ci sur le Pokémon de base pour le faire évoluer, sans passer par le Niveau 1. Vous ne pouvez utiliser cette carte ni pendant votre premier tour ni sur un Pokémon de base qui a été mis en jeu pendant ce tour.
